_comment: Finished HyperFrames animations / scenes to drop into a video, or specific effects to pull. Heavy scene files + preview MP4s live in this repo. Format matches the skill's references/library/animations.manifest.json.

animations.name: Logo reveal (coral)
animations.notes: Rising-bars mark + growthstackr wordmark scale in with soft-impact settle, coral glow bloom, and the signature flare sweep. Swap the wordmark for the logo image (brandTokens.logoUrl) and re-skin via frame.md. Sync the flare peak (~0.66s) to a soft impact SFX.
